dialogueChunks.intro: The situation just became far more dangerous, {player_name}. Our assumptions were built on sand.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The information we acted on was wrong. Not just incomplete: actively wrong. {target_npc} uncovered that the original report about {quest_focus} was based on evidence that someone tampered with. The real situation {location_hint} is nothing like what we were told, and the {enemy_type} presence there has a purpose nobody anticipated. We need {quest_item} to understand the full picture before more decisions are made on false ground. Every hour we operate on bad intelligence, {quest_stakes} grows more precarious.
dialogueChunks.outro: We built our strategy on a lie. Now we need to tear it down and start over before it collapses on us.

playerResponses.text: Bad intelligence gets people killed. I'll find the truth.
Correcting course mid-crisis. Messy but necessary. I'm in.
If the foundation was wrong, the whole operation is compromised. I'm out.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the people we tried to protect are now in greater danger because of what we did.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Our actions based on {quest_focus} provoked a retaliation nobody expected. The {enemy_type} struck back at {location} in force, and {target_npc} barely organized a defense in time. The settlement blames us for stirring the hornet's nest, and they're not entirely wrong. We made a judgment call on bad information and innocent people suffered for it. Now we need to gather {quest_item} from the aftermath {location_hint} and find a way to de-escalate before {quest_threat} spirals beyond recovery.
dialogueChunks.outro: We meant well. That doesn't undo the harm. But maybe we can still prevent the worst of it.

playerResponses.text: Cleaning up a mistake is harder than making one. But it has to be done.
Retaliation we caused. Wonderful. I'll fix it, but this better be the last time.
This is a mess of your own making. Dig yourselves out.

dialogueChunks.intro: We were played, {player_name}. Deliberately, expertly played.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} found documents {location_hint} that prove the false information about {quest_focus} was planted intentionally. Someone wanted us to act rashly, to turn our attention the wrong way while they moved on {quest_stakes} unopposed. The {enemy_type} were a distraction, herded toward us to keep our hands full while the real threat slipped past. We need {quest_item} from the site where the deception was staged, and we need to move fast before whoever orchestrated this covers their tracks completely.
dialogueChunks.outro: We didn't make a mistake: we were led into one. And the puppeteer is still pulling strings.

playerResponses.text: If someone set this trap, I'll find them. Show me where the deception started.
Manipulated into a crisis. Whoever did this is clever and dangerous.
Fighting a manipulator who's always a step ahead? That's a losing game.
